method_en: Whose money funds this AI capex cycle — internal cash flow, equity, or debt & off-balance-sheet structures? The more the stack leans on soft money, the later the cycle and the sharper the break. Curated funding map (L1/L2) + live funding-gap & credit-spread quant (L3) + Claude synthesis with rules fallback (L4/L5). Estimates are estimates — every curated number carries a tier and an as-of date. Not investment advice.
method_zh: 這輪 AI 資本支出是誰的錢——內部現金流、股權、還是債與表外結構?融資結構越靠軟錢,週期越晚、斷裂越猛。策展融資地圖(L1/L2)+ 即時資金缺口與信用利差量化(L3)+ Claude 合成與規則後備(L4/L5)。估計就是估計——每個策展數字都帶證據等級與資料時點。非投資建議。

hyperscalers.name: Microsoft
hyperscalers.note_en: OCF covers capex ~1.5×; the hardest money in the stack. Half of AI buildout sits in finance leases (off this metric).
hyperscalers.note_zh: OCF 約 1.5 倍覆蓋 capex;結構中最硬的錢。約半數 AI 建置走融資租賃(不在此指標內)。

hyperscalers.name: Alphabet
hyperscalers.note_en: Self-funded; search cash machine still outruns the TPU/DC build.
hyperscalers.note_zh: 自籌;搜尋現金機器仍跑贏 TPU/資料中心建置。

hyperscalers.name: Amazon
hyperscalers.align_note: capex 對齊 /payback live yfinance 2026-07-02;capex/OCF ≈91% 對齊 /payback runway「tight」判讀
hyperscalers.note_en: Still self-funded on paper but the tightest of the big four — capex eats ~91% of OCF; least slack before turning to debt.
hyperscalers.note_zh: 帳面仍自籌,但四巨頭中最緊——capex 吃掉約 91% 的 OCF;離轉向舉債的緩衝最小。

hyperscalers.name: Meta
hyperscalers.note_en: OCF covers capex — yet Meta still raised a record bond program AND an off-balance-sheet DC SPV (see ledger): pre-funding future capex with soft structures despite hard cash flow.
hyperscalers.note_zh: OCF 蓋得住 capex——但 Meta 仍發了創紀錄公司債並用表外資料中心 SPV(見台帳):現金流是硬的,卻已用軟結構預先融資未來 capex。

hyperscalers.name: Oracle
hyperscalers.note_en: The outlier: capex ≈2.3× OCF — the majority of its AI buildout is externally funded, against a backlog concentrated in frontier labs.
hyperscalers.note_zh: 異數:capex 約為 OCF 的 2.3 倍——AI 建置多數靠外部融資,而在手訂單又集中在前沿實驗室。

ledger.name_zh: Meta 巨型發債計畫(累計)
ledger.source_en: Record ~$30B corporate deal (2025-10) plus follow-ons; cumulative approximated.
ledger.source_zh: 2025 年 10 月創紀錄約 $30B 公司債加後續增發;累計為近似值。

ledger.name_en: Oracle IG issuance for OCI/AI capacity
ledger.name_zh: Oracle 為 OCI/AI 產能之投資級發債
ledger.cost_hint_zh: 約 5.5–6.3%;因 capex 集中度 CDS 走闊
ledger.source_en: 2025–26 issuance to fund lab-backlog buildout; cumulative approximated.
ledger.source_zh: 2025–26 為實驗室在手訂單建置之發債;累計為近似值。

ledger.name_en: Hyperion-style off-BS DC SPV (Blue Owl JV)
ledger.name_zh: Hyperion 型表外資料中心 SPV(Blue Owl 合資)
ledger.cost_hint_en: SPV debt ~6.5%+; residual-value risk parked off balance sheet
ledger.cost_hint_zh: SPV 債務約 6.5% 以上;殘值風險停在表外
ledger.source_en: ~$27B JV financing for a single DC campus, announced 2025-10; structure details partial.
ledger.source_zh: 單一資料中心園區約 $27B 合資融資,2025 年 10 月宣布;結構細節僅部分公開。

ledger.name_zh: GPU 抵押授信,累計已提取
ledger.cost_hint_zh: 約 SOFR+5–7(≈9–11%);抵押品為 GPU,殘值假設 4–6 年
ledger.source_en: DDTL-style facilities across neoclouds; drawn amount is our estimate from filings + news.
ledger.source_zh: 各新雲的延遲提取貸款;已提取金額為我們由申報與新聞推估。

ledger.name_zh: 私募信貸 AI 資料中心放款(Blue Owl/Apollo 型,年化)
ledger.source_en: Annual commitment run-rate approximated from fund disclosures + press.
ledger.source_zh: 年度承諾額由基金揭露與媒體報導近似。

ledger.name_zh: NVIDIA 供應商融資 / 錨定承諾
ledger.cost_hint_en: Equity stakes + lease/backstop structures; circular — specifics in /aibubble ledger
ledger.cost_hint_zh: 股權入股 + 租賃/背書結構;循環交易——具體金額見 /aibubble 台帳
ledger.source_en: Headline commitments (incl. up-to-$100B OpenAI-style anchor) are progressive per deployment; drawn tranche is our estimate.
ledger.source_zh: 頭條承諾(含最高 $100B 的 OpenAI 型錨定)按部署進度分批;已投放額度為我們的估計。

ledger.name_zh: 實驗室算力預付款餘額
ledger.cost_hint_en: Terms confidential; treated as the softest funding in the stack
ledger.cost_hint_zh: 條款保密;視為結構中最軟的資金
ledger.source_en: Inferred from deferred-revenue lines + reporting; TSMC-relevant as counterparty prepay analogue.
ledger.source_zh: 由遞延營收科目與報導推估;對台積電是「客戶預付款」的對照組。

ledger.cost_hint_zh: 以 $850B IPO 申報估值定價
ledger.source_zh: 累計募資 $122B,同 /payback KB(新聞報導值)。
累計募資 $95B,同 /payback KB(新聞報導值)。

labs.name: OpenAI
labs.align_note: 營收 run-rate $25B / 累計募資 $122B / IPO 申報估值 $850B 對齊 /payback KB v2 2026-07-02;燒錢為 /payback OUR_EST 沿用
labs.note_en: Burn ≈1.4× revenue run-rate. Its compute commitments (see /payback) sit beneath Oracle's and others' capex plans.
labs.note_zh: 燒錢約為營收 run-rate 的 1.4 倍。其算力承諾(見 /payback)壓在 Oracle 等雲端的 capex 計畫底下。

labs.name: Anthropic
labs.align_note: 營收 run-rate $12B / 累計募資 $95B / Series-H 估值 $965B 對齊 /payback KB v2 2026-07-02;燒錢為 /payback OUR_EST 沿用
labs.note_en: Burn ≈1.5× revenue run-rate; compute routed via Amazon/Google clouds rather than owned DCs.
labs.note_zh: 燒錢約為營收 run-rate 的 1.5 倍;算力走 Amazon/Google 雲而非自建資料中心。

composite.verdict_en: LEVERING — the marginal dollar is migrating to debt & off-balance-sheet
composite.verdict_zh: LEVERING — 邊際資金正轉向債與表外結構

subscores.name_zh: GPU 抵押·供應商·SPV 占比

structure_read.summary_en: Composite 41.6/100 = LEVERING. The Big-4 hyperscalers still self-fund: MSFT/GOOGL/META/AMZN run capex/OCF at 57–102% with ~0% external; aggregate positive funding gap is only $26.2B (5.4% of $489.5B TTM capex). The soft signal comes elsewhere: gross debt+SPV issuance is $120B (24.5% of capex) and soft-money share is 63.5/100 across a $440B curated ledger. The marginal dollar now sits in the softest layers — off-BS DC SPVs (softness 5, ~6.5%+), GPU-collateralized facilities (~9–11%), private credit ($50B drawn, 7–9%), NVIDIA vendor financing ($15B/$115B committed, circular) and lab prepayments. Softening fastest: Oracle (42.5% external, capex/OCF 174%, CDS widening) and the private-credit/SPV complex. Spreads are calm (IG 0.82%, HY 2.66%) but CCC−IG 6.78pp with decompression=True and CCC +0.35 over 6m — the low-quality tail is already leaking.
structure_read.summary_zh: 綜合分數41.6=加槓桿。四大雲廠仍自籌：微軟/Google/Meta/亞馬遜資本支出/營運現金流57–102%，外部依賴約0%；總資金缺口僅262億（占4,895億TTM資本支出5.4%）。軟訊號在別處：債務+SPV發行1,200億（占24.5%），軟錢分數63.5，涵蓋4,400億策劃帳本。邊際資金已落在最軟層：表外資料中心SPV（軟度5，約6.5%+）、GPU抵押融資（約9–11%）、私募信貸（已提500億，7–9%）、輝達廠商融資（150億/承諾1,150億，循環）與實驗室預付款。軟化最快：甲骨文（外部42.5%、資本支出/現金流174%、CDS走闊）與私募信貸/SPV複合體。利差仍平（IG 0.82%、HY 2.66%），但CCC−IG 6.78pp且解壓縮=真，CCC半年+0.35——低評級尾端已滲漏。

tsmc_view.summary_en: TSMC's exposure is indirect: demand aggregates through NVIDIA/AMD. The stable core — MSFT/GOOGL/META/AMZN at ~0% external funding — anchors baseload CoWoS/leading-edge orders; these do not wobble first. The fragile edge is debt- and soft-money-funded demand: Oracle (174% capex/OCF, $23.7B gap, widening CDS), neoclouds on GPU-collateralized loans (9–11%, 4–6yr assumed residual) and private-credit-funded DCs. If those LTVs are called, NVIDIA's $115B committed vendor-financing book — circular equity/backstop structures — must expand to keep orders alive, or the orders vanish. That is the transmission into TSMC: not a hyperscaler cut, but a neocloud/lab air-pocket that trims NVIDIA/AMD wafer starts and CoWoS bookings. Prepayments and long-term capacity agreements from labs (OpenAI 1.4×, Anthropic 1.5× burn) and neoclouds carry the highest counterparty risk; hyperscaler LTAs are money-good.
tsmc_view.summary_zh: 台積電曝險為間接：需求經輝達/超微匯總。穩定核心——微軟/Google/Meta/亞馬遜外部依賴約0%——支撐CoWoS與先進製程基載訂單，不會最先動搖。脆弱邊緣是債務與軟錢驅動需求：甲骨文（資本支出/現金流174%、缺口237億、CDS走闊）、依GPU抵押貸款（9–11%、假設4–6年殘值）的neocloud及私募信貸資助資料中心。若LTV被追繳，輝達1,150億承諾廠商融資（循環股權/背書結構）須擴張以維繫訂單，否則訂單蒸發。此即傳導台積電之路徑：非雲廠砍單，而是neocloud/實驗室斷氣，削減輝達/超微晶圓投片與CoWoS訂位。實驗室（OpenAI燒1.4×、Anthropic 1.5×）與neocloud的預付款及長約對手風險最高；雲廠長約仍屬穩健。

thesis.direction_en: LEVERING — the stack is softening without a public price signal yet. Confidence medium: cash-flow gaps (small, 5.4%) and spreads (calm IG/HY) disagree with soft-money share (63.5) and issuance (24.5%); the CCC decompression flag is the tie-breaker pointing to quiet levering.
thesis.direction_zh: 加槓桿——資金結構在尚無公開價格訊號下持續軟化。信心中等：現金流缺口（僅5.4%）與利差（IG/HY平穩）同軟錢分數（63.5）及發行量（24.5%）不一致；CCC解壓縮旗標成為決勝點，指向無聲加槓桿。

leading_signals.en: Oracle & neocloud CDS / private CDX-HY movement before cash bond OAS reprices
leading_signals.zh: 甲骨文與neocloud的CDS、私募CDX-HY在現券OAS重定價前先動

leading_signals.en: GPU-collateralized facility LTV terms & assumed 4–6yr residual haircuts tightening (T3 ledger)
leading_signals.zh: GPU抵押融資LTV條款與假設4–6年殘值折價收緊（T3帳本）

leading_signals.en: NVIDIA vendor-financing draw ratio rising toward the $115B committed (currently $15B drawn)
leading_signals.zh: 輝達廠商融資動用比率向1,150億承諾攀升（現僅提150億）

leading_signals.en: Private-credit unitranche spreads (7–9%) and committed-vs-drawn gap on AI-DC lending
leading_signals.zh: 私募信貸單一分層利差（7–9%）及AI資料中心貸款承諾與動用差額

leading_signals.en: Lab prepayment terms & burn multiples (OpenAI 1.4×, Anthropic 1.5×) vs new round cadence
leading_signals.zh: 實驗室預付款條款與燒錢倍數（OpenAI 1.4×、Anthropic 1.5×）對比新輪節奏

scenarios.trigger_en: Bond+SPV issuance rises above $120B while HY OAS stays <3% and CCC−IG holds 6.5–8pp — structure softens with no price break.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 債務+SPV發行升破1,200億，HY OAS維持<3%、CCC−IG守6.5–8pp——結構軟化但無價格斷裂。

scenarios.trigger_en: Aggregate funding gap stays <5% of capex, mega-bond/SPV programs stop growing, HY OAS <3%, CCC−IG compresses back <6pp.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 總資金缺口維持<5%，巨額債券/SPV計畫停止擴張，HY OAS<3%，CCC−IG壓回<6pp。

scenarios.trigger_en: A neocloud restructuring or GPU-loan LTV call headline; CCC−IG >8pp; NVIDIA vendor financing forced to draw beyond $30B toward the $115B backstop.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 出現neocloud重整或GPU貸款LTV追繳新聞；CCC−IG>8pp；輝達廠商融資被迫動用超過300億、朝1,150億背書逼近。

scenarios.trigger_en: HY OAS +150bp in a quarter plus a hyperscaler cutting capex guidance — SPV, private credit, vendor financing and prepayment layers shut simultaneously.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 單季HY OAS+150bp並有雲廠下修資本支出指引——SPV、私募信貸、廠商融資與預付款層同時關閉。

falsification.en: Big-4 external share stays ~0% AND soft-money ledger stops growing while committed-but-undrawn (NVIDIA $115B, private credit $60B) rolls off unused — proves no marginal reliance on soft money.
falsification.zh: 四大外部依賴維持約0%，且軟錢帳本停止成長、承諾未動用（輝達1,150億、私募信貸600億）未用即到期——證明對軟錢無邊際依賴。

falsification.en: CCC−IG compresses below 6pp and decompression flag turns false over two quarters — the leaking tail was noise, not levering.
falsification.zh: CCC−IG壓回<6pp且解壓縮旗標連兩季轉否——尾端滲漏屬雜訊而非加槓桿。

falsification.en: Lab burn multiples fall below 1.0× as revenue outruns spend, removing the softest prepayment/equity dependence.
falsification.zh: 實驗室燒錢倍數因營收超越支出而降至<1.0×，消除最軟的預付款/股權依賴。

early_warning.en: Private/single-name CDS on Oracle & neoclouds; private CDX-HY quotes
early_warning.zh: 甲骨文與neocloud的私募/單名CDS；私募CDX-HY報價
CCC−IG利差與解壓縮旗標（現6.78pp、真）

early_warning.en: GPU-collateralized facility LTV/residual haircut changes & new-deal coupons (~9–11%)
early_warning.zh: GPU抵押融資LTV/殘值折價變動與新案票息（約9–11%）

early_warning.en: NVIDIA vendor-financing drawn vs $115B committed; new anchor/backstop deals
early_warning.zh: 輝達廠商融資已提對比1,150億承諾；新錨定/背書交易

early_warning.en: Private-credit AI-DC drawn vs committed ($50B/$60B) & unitranche spread
early_warning.zh: 私募信貸AI資料中心已提對承諾（500億/600億）與單一分層利差

early_warning.en: Mega-bond + off-BS SPV cumulative issuance vs $120B run-rate
early_warning.zh: 巨額債券+表外SPV累計發行對比1,200億運行率

early_warning.en: Hyperscaler capex/OCF ratios & lab burn multiples (OpenAI 1.4×, Anthropic 1.5×)
early_warning.zh: 雲廠資本支出/現金流比與實驗室燒錢倍數（OpenAI 1.4×、Anthropic 1.5×）

funding_stack.desc_en: Capex paid straight out of the ads/cloud/software cash machine. No maturity wall, no covenants, no margin calls. As long as OCF covers capex, the cycle is self-financing.
funding_stack.desc_zh: 資本支出直接由廣告/雲端/軟體的現金機器支付。沒有到期牆、沒有契約條款、沒有追繳。只要 OCF 蓋得住 capex,這個週期就是自我融資。

funding_stack.hardness_zh: 硬 — 便宜、長天期、公開
funding_stack.desc_en: Mega-bond programs (Meta-, Oracle-style). Still cheap and long-dated, but it creates a maturity schedule and makes the capex cycle visible to — and dependent on — the bond market.
funding_stack.desc_zh: 巨型發債計畫(Meta、Oracle 型)。仍然便宜且長天期,但從此有了到期時程,也讓 capex 週期開始被債券市場看見、並依賴債券市場。

funding_stack.name_zh: 新雲私募信貸與 GPU 抵押貸款
funding_stack.hardness_zh: 軟 — 浮動利率、依賴抵押品
funding_stack.desc_en: CoreWeave-style delayed-draw term loans at SOFR+, secured by GPUs whose residual value is an assumption, not a market. Repricing here does not show up in public spreads first.
funding_stack.desc_zh: CoreWeave 型的延遲提取定期貸款,SOFR 加碼計息,抵押品是 GPU——其殘值是假設而非市場。這一層重新定價時,不會先反映在公開利差上。

funding_stack.hardness_zh: 更軟 — 看市場情緒開關
funding_stack.desc_en: OpenAI / Anthropic-scale rounds fund burn that exceeds revenue. Equity has no maturity wall, but the window can shut in one quarter — and prepayments to clouds stop with it.
funding_stack.desc_zh: OpenAI / Anthropic 級別的募資輪支付超過營收的燒錢。股權沒有到期牆,但募資窗口可能一季內關閉——對雲端的預付款也會跟著停。

funding_stack.name_id_note: instrument ids vendor_financing / spv_leaseback / prepayment map here
funding_stack.name_zh: 供應商融資 / SPV / 售後回租
funding_stack.hardness_zh: 最軟 — 循環且在表外
funding_stack.desc_en: Chip vendors funding their own customers, off-balance-sheet DC SPVs, compute prepayments. Demand and supply share one balance sheet; residual risk is parked where it is hardest to see. Circular-deal specifics live in the /aibubble circularity ledger.
funding_stack.desc_zh: 晶片商出錢給自己的客戶、表外資料中心 SPV、算力預付款。需求與供給共用同一張資產負債表;殘值風險停在最難看見的地方。循環交易的具體金額見 /aibubble 循環台帳。

contagion_channels.desc_en: IG spreads widen → private credit reprices with a lag and a multiple; floating-rate GPU loans feel it first.
contagion_channels.desc_zh: 投資級利差走闊 → 私募信貸以落後且放大的方式重新定價;浮動利率的 GPU 貸款最先感受到。

contagion_channels.desc_en: A GPU-loan LTV call or neocloud restructuring forces vendors to choose: extend more financing (deeper circularity) or let a customer fail (demand air-pocket).
contagion_channels.desc_zh: GPU 貸款追繳或新雲重整,逼供應商二選一:再多給融資(循環更深)或讓客戶倒下(需求真空)。

contagion_channels.desc_en: If the equity window closes, lab compute prepayments and commitments stop — cloud backlog quality drops, and the 'hard' OCF layer inherits the revenue hole.
contagion_channels.desc_zh: 股權窗口一關,實驗室的算力預付與承諾就停——雲端在手訂單品質下降,「硬」的 OCF 層反而接下營收缺口。

contagion_channels.desc_en: Off-balance-sheet losses migrating back on-balance-sheet (SPV consolidation, vendor write-downs) is the classic late-cycle surprise that repriced GE and the telcos.
contagion_channels.desc_zh: 表外損失回到表內(SPV 併表、供應商減值)是典型的晚週期驚嚇——GE 與電信業當年就是這樣被重新定價。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Option-adjusted spread of US investment-grade corporates.
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 美國投資級公司債的選擇權調整利差。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: Prices the mega-bond layer: what Meta/Oracle-style programs cost at the margin.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 為巨型發債層定價:Meta/Oracle 型計畫的邊際成本。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: >1.3% 或 6 個月 +30bp = 發債窗口收窄。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Option-adjusted spread of US high-yield corporates.
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 美國高收益公司債的選擇權調整利差。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: The general credit-cycle thermometer; funding stress migrates from HY inward.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 整體信用週期的溫度計;融資壓力從高收益向內滲透。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Spread of the weakest rated credits.
indicator_dictionary.why_en: Closest public proxy for where GPU-collateralized / neocloud paper would trade.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 最接近 GPU 抵押/新雲債務會交易在哪裡的公開代理。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_en: CCC widening while HY is calm = decompression — the bottom of the stack cracking first.
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: HY 平靜但 CCC 走闊 = 利差解壓縮——結構最底層先裂。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Quality spread between the softest and hardest public credit.
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 公開信用中最軟與最硬之間的品質利差。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: One number for 'how differently is soft money priced vs hard money'.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 一個數字回答「軟錢與硬錢的定價差多少」。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: >8 個百分點 = 軟錢層實質被拒於門外。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Per-hyperscaler TTM capex minus TTM operating cash flow.
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 各巨頭 TTM 資本支出減 TTM 營運現金流。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: Positive gap = the marginal capex dollar is externally funded.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 缺口為正 = 邊際的 capex 一美元來自外部融資。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_en: Aggregate gap >15% of capex = the cycle no longer self-funds.
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: 整體缺口 >capex 的 15% = 週期不再自籌。

indicator_dictionary.why_en: Who is spending borrowed money — their orders wobble first.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 誰在花借來的錢——他們的訂單最先晃動。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: >40% 外部 = capex 依賴債券市場。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Ledger events weighted by softness rank (1 hard … 5 softest), drawn amounts.
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 台帳事件按軟硬等級(1 最硬…5 最軟)以已提取金額加權。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: The structural read: how far down the stack the marginal dollar has migrated.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 結構性判讀:邊際資金已經下沉到結構的第幾層。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: 分數 >70 = 供應商融資/SPV/股權主導新錢。

indicator_dictionary.name_zh: 實驗室燒錢 ÷ 營收 run-rate
indicator_dictionary.what_en: Estimated annual cash burn over annualized revenue, per frontier lab.
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 估計年燒錢除以年化營收,逐前沿實驗室。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: How dependent the equity layer is on the next round staying open.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 股權層有多依賴下一輪募資窗口維持開啟。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: >1.5 倍 = 只差一次窗口關閉就進入壓力。

ledger_note_en: ALL rows are curated 2026-world approximations (EST). Private terms are not public; sizes and costs are news-level estimates with tiers and as-of dates. Circular-deal specifics live in the /aibubble circularity ledger — referenced, not restated.
ledger_note_zh: 全部列均為策展的 2026 世界近似值(EST)。私募條款不公開;金額與成本為新聞層級估計,附證據等級與資料時點。循環交易的具體數字在 /aibubble 循環台帳——僅引用,不重寫。

tsmc_view.intro_en: Who funds with the softest money? Their orders are the first to wobble. TSMC's exposure is mostly indirect — demand aggregates through NVIDIA/AMD — so counterparty risk arrives as sudden order-mix shifts, not defaults on TSMC itself. Prepayments and long-term capacity agreements are TSMC's own version of this ledger.
tsmc_view.intro_zh: 誰用最軟的錢下單?他們的訂單最先晃。台積電的曝險多半是間接的——需求經 NVIDIA/AMD 匯集——所以交易對手風險以「訂單組合突變」而非「對台積電違約」的形式到來。預付款與產能長約就是台積電自己的這本台帳。

rows.funding_zh: GPU 抵押債 + 供應商撐持
rows.channel_en: Order via NVIDIA; first to cancel if private credit reprices or GPU residuals get cut.
rows.channel_zh: 經 NVIDIA 下單;私募信貸重定價或 GPU 殘值下修時最先砍單。

rows.channel_en: Its compute commitments underwrite Oracle-and-others' capex; if the equity window shuts, the whole chain re-plans.
rows.channel_zh: 其算力承諾撐起 Oracle 等的 capex;股權窗口一關,整條鏈重排計畫。

rows.funding_zh: 舉債支應 capex(capex 約 OCF 2.3 倍)
rows.channel_en: Bond-market access is its oxygen; backlog concentrated in labs makes it a second-derivative lab bet.
rows.channel_zh: 債券市場是它的氧氣;在手訂單集中於實驗室,等於實驗室的二階槓桿。

rows.channel_en: Burn multiple similar to peers but demand routed through AMZN/GOOGL clouds — hard-money intermediaries.
rows.channel_zh: 燒錢倍數與同儕相近,但需求經 AMZN/GOOGL 雲——由硬錢中介吸收第一擊。

rows.funding_zh: OCF + 公司債 + 表外 SPV
rows.channel_en: Self-funded core; the SPV layer is the watch item, not the ad cash machine.
rows.channel_zh: 核心自籌;要盯的是 SPV 那一層,不是廣告現金機器。

rows.channel_en: Hardest money in the stack — the most durable orders in the book.
rows.channel_zh: 結構中最硬的錢——訂單簿裡最耐震的部分。

blind_spots_en: Private-credit terms are not public — sizes, costs and covenants in the ledger are news-level approximations (T3).
GPU residual-value assumptions inside collateralized loans are unobservable; a repricing there would NOT show in public spreads first.
SPV / off-balance-sheet coverage is incomplete by design — what is parked off-BS is exactly what is hardest to see.
Compute-prepayment terms are confidential; we treat them as softest money but cannot see protections either way.
OCF is company-total, not AI-segment — the funding gap understates AI-specific external funding for diversified firms.
The financing ledger is a curated sample, not a census; the soft-money share depends on inclusion choices.
blind_spots_zh: 私募信貸條款不公開——台帳中的金額、成本與條款屬新聞層級近似(T3)。
GPU 抵押貸款內的殘值假設無法觀測;那一層重定價不會先反映在公開利差上。
SPV / 表外覆蓋天生不完整——刻意放在表外的,正是最難看見的。
算力預付款條款保密;我們視之為最軟的錢,但也看不見其中的保護條款。
OCF 是公司整體而非 AI 分部——對多元化公司,資金缺口低估了 AI 專屬的外部融資。
融資台帳是策展樣本而非普查;軟錢占比受收錄選擇影響。
